summary: P1.2 Quality Mode Strategy and P1.3 Analytics & Observability — ALL VERIFIED. 21/21 backend tests passed. Frontend quality mode selector UI verified with all 3 buttons (Fast, Balanced, High Quality) present and clickable.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays quality mode section - requires force=True click or dismissal first

critical_code_review_comments: story_engine_routes.py: QUALITY_MODES dict at lines 363-391 correctly defines fast, balanced, high_quality with label, description, max_scenes, image_quality, use_sora, eta_multiplier, estimated_time_range
story_engine_routes.py: GET /quality-modes endpoint at lines 721-728 returns all modes with default='balanced'
story_engine_routes.py: POST /create at lines 466-476 stores quality_mode and quality_config on job document
story_engine_routes.py: GET /status returns quality_mode and quality_config at lines 652-653
story_engine_routes.py: GET /admin/generation-analytics at lines 1323-1423 returns totals, retries, reuse, quality_modes, timing sections
story_engine_routes.py: Admin auth check via _get_admin dependency at lines 69-72
pipeline.py: process_next_stage checks reuse_info and skips reused stages at lines 427-440
StoryVideoPipeline.js: qualityMode state at line 159, quality mode selector UI at lines 1060-1089
ProgressiveGeneration.js: quality-mode-label display at lines 489-494 for non-balanced modes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and known story_engine job
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.2 Quality Mode Strategy and P1.3 Analytics & Observability fully verified in iteration 391. Key findings: 1) GET /api/story-engine/quality-modes returns 3 modes (fast, balanced, high_quality) with label, description, max_scenes, estimated_time_range; 2) Default mode is 'balanced'; 3) Scene limits: fast=3, balanced=5, high_quality=7; 4) POST /api/story-engine/create accepts quality_mode parameter and stores it on job; 5) GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns quality_mode and quality_config fields; 6) GET /api/story-engine/admin/generation-analytics returns totals (total_jobs, completed, failed, completion_rate, failure_rate), retries (total_retries, jobs_with_retries, retry_rate), reuse (total_reuse_jobs, fresh_jobs, style_remixes, voice_remixes, continues), quality_modes (fast, balanced, high_quality counts), timing (avg_fresh_completion_seconds, avg_reuse_completion_seconds, speedup_percent); 7) Analytics endpoint requires admin auth (returns 403 for normal user); 8) Frontend has quality mode selector with data-testid='quality-mode-fast', 'quality-mode-balanced', 'quality-mode-high_quality'; 9) ProgressiveGeneration shows quality-mode-label for non-balanced modes; 10) P1.1 analyze-reuse regression tests pass (style_remix, voice_remix modes work correctly).

quality_modes_have_required_properties.details: Each mode has label, description, max_scenes, estimated_time_range

analytics_returns_totals_section.details: Has total_jobs, completed, failed, completion_rate, failure_rate

analytics_returns_reuse_section.details: Has total_reuse_jobs, fresh_jobs, style_remixes, voice_remixes, continues

frontend_progressive_generation_quality_.details: data-testid='quality-mode-label' present in ProgressiveGeneration.js at line 491

p11_regression_analyze_reuse.details: analyze-reuse endpoint still works for style_remix and voice_remix modes

pipeline_reuse_skip_logic.details: process_next_stage checks reuse_info and skips reused stages (lines 427-440)

high_quality.description: Best visuals and narration, takes longer
